# cyberdrew.dev — Drew

> Drew is a security architect who builds autonomous AI systems you can trust — agentic
> dev-tooling, security-first products, and a governed fleet of AI daemons. Founder of DCYFR
> Labs and Head of AI at GameShark Labs. He works at the intersection of autonomous agents
> and security: building AI that can take real actions, with the sandboxes, kill-switches,
> and spend gates that let it run unsupervised without going off the rails.

## Key pages
- [cyberdrew.dev](https://www.cyberdrew.dev): Positioning, selected work, writing, and contact.
- [DCYFR Labs](https://www.dcyfr.ai): AI-native studio — agentic infrastructure and security-first autonomy.
- [Blog](https://www.dcyfr.ai/blog): Essays on agentic AI, AI security, and building with autonomous systems.

## Selected work
- DCYFR AI (@dcyfr/ai): Portable open-source TypeScript AI agent runtime — model routing, tool-use, and MCP wiring. https://www.dcyfr.ai/ai
- Agent Governance & Safety: Sandboxes, kill-switches, credential isolation, and enforced spend limits for agents that take real actions. https://www.dcyfr.ai/about
- Autonomous Agent Fleet: A governed swarm of AI daemons — research, code review, monitoring, self-healing — on a local-first model stack. https://github.com/dcyfr-labs
- SharkVault: A backer-funded consumer product taken end-to-end, largely by agents. https://sharkvault.gamesharklabs.com

## Writing
- What's New in @dcyfr/ai: The v3 Line — https://www.dcyfr.ai/blog/whats-new-in-dcyfr-ai-v3
- AI Assistants as Development Partners — https://www.dcyfr.ai/blog/ai-assistants-as-development-partners
- OWASP Top 10 for Agentic AI — https://www.dcyfr.ai/blog/owasp-top-10-agentic-ai
- Building with AI — https://www.dcyfr.ai/blog/building-with-ai

- Email: hello@cyberdrew.dev
